design_philosophy: Authority, clarity, and function-first. The design must feel like a precision tool for career advancement, not a generic SaaS. Sharp corners, high contrast borders, and objective typography. Avoid gradients entirely.

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter text-zinc-950 leading-tight
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-zinc-950

extension_popup.container: relative flex flex-col h-full bg-white overflow-hidden text-zinc-950
extension_popup.header: sticky top-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-zinc-200
extension_popup.footer_actions: absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-full p-4 bg-zinc-50 border-t border-zinc-200 flex flex-col gap-2

web_dashboard.grid_mode: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6)
web_dashboard.card: bg-white border border-zinc-200 p-6 rounded-sm shadow-sm

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-bold tracking-wide text-white transition-colors bg-zinc-950 rounded-sm hover:bg-zinc-800 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-950 focus:ring-offset-2 w-full sm:w-auto
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-bold tracking-wide transition-colors bg-white border border-zinc-200 text-zinc-950 rounded-sm hover:bg-zinc-50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-200 focus:ring-offset-2 w-full sm:w-auto

tags.match: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 text-xs font-bold text-emerald-700 bg-emerald-50 border border-emerald-200 rounded-sm
tags.missing: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 text-xs font-bold text-zinc-500 bg-zinc-100 border border-zinc-200 rounded-sm line-through decoration-zinc-400

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-sm border border-zinc-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-zinc-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-950 focus:border-transparent transition-shadow

components.job_description_preview: p-3 bg-zinc-50 border border-zinc-200 rounded-sm text-sm font-mono text-zinc-700 h-32 overflow-y-auto

image_urls.description: Modern buildings with glass facade against sky (Hero Image)
Top view of a desk with resume, coffee cup, and laptop
Wooden table topped with papers and a pen

accessibility_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST have visible hover states altering background and text color.
accessibility_and_interactions.focus_states: Visible focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2) required on all inputs and buttons.
accessibility_and_interactions.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive and key informational elements. Format: kebab-case, role-based. E.g., data-testid='generate-resume-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Google Fonts: 'Chivo' (weights: 400, 700, 900) and 'IBM Plex Sans' (weights: 400, 500, 600) + 'IBM Plex Mono'.
Avoid generic border-radius (like rounded-lg/xl/2xl). Use 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none' strictly for the Technical/Swiss Brutalist aesthetic.

For the Chrome extension view, ensure the parent container enforces w-[380px] h-[600px] explicitly. Use the defined 'extension_popup' layout variables to ensure the footer actions stick to the bottom.
Do NOT use any gradients. Rely on stark contrast, 1px solid borders, and sharp box shadows.
Customize Shadcn components to remove soft radii and soft shadows. Align them to the high-contrast, technical visual language.
Integrate Lucide React icons, but ensure they are sized proportionally (e.g., w-4 h-4 in buttons) and use stark colors.
Always apply data-testid to every button, link, list item, and major UI container.
